additional_rules.name: missing-context-parameter
additional_rules.message: Exported function without context.Context parameter — consider adding ctx for I/O operations
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add `ctx context.Context` as the first parameter if this function performs any I/O (DB, HTTP, file).

additional_rules.name: capitalized-error-string
additional_rules.message: Error string starts with capital letter — Go convention is lowercase, no trailing punctuation
additional_rules.fix_hint: Start error strings with a lowercase letter and omit trailing periods: `errors.New("not found")` instead of `errors.New("Not found.")`.

additional_rules.name: panic-in-application
additional_rules.message: panic() in application code — return errors instead of panicking
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace panic() with returning an error. Only use panic in main() or test helpers.
